title: SWAP IT UP !
subtitle: Solo dev challenge
description1:
A guided project I really enjoyed working on. 
It allowed me to combine structure, problem-solving, and creativity — everything I enjoy in coding.
description2:
Despite its simple appearance, the game relies on several underlying mechanisms such as combination detection, chain reactions, and dynamic grid updates. 
I first built it in React.js before rewriting it entirely in TypeScript to establish a cleaner and more structured foundation.
description3: While revisiting some mathematical fundamentals, I identified ways to optimize the game logic. I also implemented a "best hint" system to improve move detection, with additional optimization ideas such as a backtracking-based approach suggested during discussions with my brother, who is also a developer.
description4: The project is currently being refactored.
